headline: Is Macerich Stock Worth Buying Near Fair Value With Risks Ahead Now?
summary: MAC surges 58.4% in a year as leasing and occupancy improve, but fair valuation, high leverage and limited upside complicate the buying case.

headline: Jim Cramer on Simon Property Group: “Terrific Record, Buy It”
summary: Simon Property Group, Inc. (NYSE:SPG) was among the stocks Jim Cramer highlighted during Mad Money, as he noted the rotation into defensive sectors. Cramer highlighted the stock’s yield, as he said: … Simon Property Group. The late great David Simon put together the best collection of shopping malls in America. The stock now yields 4.15%. […]
